titles.title: Stranger Things
titles.overview: When a young boy vanishes, a small town uncovers a mystery involving secret experiments, terrifying supernatural forces and one strange little girl.

titles.title: The Last of Us
titles.overview: After a global pandemic destroys civilization, a hardened survivor takes charge of a 14-year-old girl who may be humanity's last hope.

titles.title: The Bear
titles.overview: A young chef from the fine dining world returns to Chicago to run his family's sandwich shop after a heartbreaking death.

titles.title: Shōgun
titles.overview: When a mysterious European ship is found marooned in a nearby fishing village, Lord Yoshii Toranaga discovers secrets that could tip the scales of power.

titles.title: Fallout
titles.overview: In a future, post-apocalyptic Los Angeles brought about by nuclear decimation, citizens must live in underground bunkers to protect themselves from radiation.

titles.title: House of the Dragon
titles.overview: The Targaryen civil war begins — the Dance of the Dragons — as rival claimants fight for the Iron Throne.

titles.title: The Mandalorian
titles.overview: The travels of a lone bounty hunter in the outer reaches of the galaxy, far from the authority of the New Republic.

titles.title: Andor
titles.overview: Prequel series to Star Wars: Rogue One — the path that led a rebel spy into the Rebellion.

titles.title: Severance
titles.overview: Mark leads a team of office workers whose memories have been surgically divided between their work and personal lives.

titles.title: Ted Lasso
titles.overview: An American football coach is hired to manage a struggling English soccer team — despite knowing nothing about soccer.

titles.title: The Morning Show
titles.overview: An inside look at the lives of the people who help America wake up in the morning, exploring the unique challenges faced by the team.

titles.title: Reacher
titles.overview: Jack Reacher, a veteran military police investigator, has just recently entered civilian life when he is wrongfully arrested.

titles.title: The Boys
titles.overview: A group of vigilantes set out to take down corrupt superheroes who abuse their superpowers.

titles.title: Invincible
titles.overview: An ordinary teenager discovers his father is the most powerful superhero on the planet — and that everything he thought he knew is a lie.

titles.title: Wednesday
titles.overview: Smart, sarcastic and a bit dead inside, Wednesday Addams investigates a murder spree while making new friends — and foes — at Nevermore Academy.

titles.title: Bridgerton
titles.overview: Wealth, lust, and betrayal set against the backdrop of Regency-era England, seen through the eyes of the powerful Bridgerton family.

titles.title: Squid Game
titles.overview: Hundreds of cash-strapped players accept a strange invitation to compete in children's games. Inside, a tempting prize awaits — with deadly high stakes.

titles.title: Arcane
titles.overview: Amid the stark discord of twin cities Piltover and Zaun, two sisters fight on rival sides of a war between magic technologies and clashing convictions.

titles.title: One Piece (Live Action)
titles.overview: Monkey D. Luffy sets off on an adventure with his pirate crew in hopes of finding the greatest treasure ever, known as the One Piece.

titles.title: The Penguin
titles.overview: Following the events of The Batman, Oswald Cobblepot seeks to fill the power vacuum left by the death of Carmine Falcone.

titles.title: True Detective: Night Country
titles.overview: In Ennis, Alaska, detectives investigate the disappearance of eight men from a research station — and a long-buried truth.

titles.title: The Agency
titles.overview: A spy thriller about a covert CIA officer who returns to London Station after a long undercover mission.

titles.title: Landman
titles.overview: A modern-day tale of fortune seeking in the world of West Texas oil rigs.

titles.title: Yellowstone
titles.overview: A ranching family in Montana faces off against others encroaching on their land.

titles.title: Dune: Prophecy
titles.overview: Two Harkonnen sisters combat forces that threaten the future of humankind and establish the fabled sect that will become known as the Bene Gesserit.

titles.title: Star Wars: Skeleton Crew
titles.overview: Four kids make a mysterious discovery on their home planet that leads them on an adventure across the galaxy.

titles.title: Agatha All Along
titles.overview: Agatha Harkness embarks on the legendary Witches' Road with unexpected companions.

titles.title: Loki
titles.overview: The mercurial villain Loki resumes his role as the God of Mischief in a new place and time.

titles.title: The Rookie
titles.overview: Starting over isn't easy, especially for John Nolan who, after a life-altering incident, is pursuing his dream of being an LAPD officer.

titles.title: Only Murders in the Building
titles.overview: Three strangers who share an obsession with true crime suddenly find themselves wrapped up in one.

titles.title: The Night Agent
titles.overview: A low-level FBI agent works in the basement of the White House manning a phone that never rings — until the night it does.

titles.title: 3 Body Problem
titles.overview: A fateful decision in 1960s China reverberates in the present, where a group of scientists partner with a detective to confront an existential planetary threat.

titles.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender (Live)
titles.overview: A young boy known as the Avatar must master the four elemental powers to save a world at war — and fight against an enemy bent on domination.

titles.title: Top Boy
titles.overview: Two seasoned drug dealers return to the gritty streets of London, but their pursuits of money and power are threatened by a young and ruthless hustler.

titles.title: Dark
titles.overview: A missing child sets four families on a frantic hunt for answers as they unearth a mind-bending mystery that spans three generations.

titles.title: The Witcher
titles.overview: Geralt of Rivia, a mutated monster-hunter for hire, journeys toward his destiny in a turbulent world where people often prove more wicked than beasts.

titles.title: Slow Horses
titles.overview: A dysfunctional team of MI5 agents — and their obnoxious boss, the notorious Jackson Lamb — navigate the espionage world's smoke and mirrors.

titles.title: Silo
titles.overview: In a ruined and toxic future, a community exists in a giant underground silo that plunges hundreds of stories deep.

titles.title: Foundation
titles.overview: A complex saga of humans scattered on planets throughout the galaxy all living under the rule of the Galactic Empire.

titles.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Rings of Power
titles.overview: Epic drama set thousands of years before the events of J.R.R. Tolkien's The Hobbit and The Lord of the Rings.

titles.title: Gen V
titles.overview: From the world of The Boys comes Gen V, following young adult superheroes as they adjust to college life.

titles.title: Mr. & Mrs. Smith
titles.overview: Two strangers land jobs with a spy agency that offers them a life of espionage, wealth, and travel — if they pose as a couple.

titles.title: Dune: Part Two
titles.overview: Paul Atreides unites with Chani and the Fremen while seeking revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family.

titles.title: Oppenheimer
titles.overview: The story of American scientist J. Robert Oppenheimer and his role in the development of the atomic bomb.

titles.title: Inside Out 2
titles.overview: A sequel that features Riley entering puberty and experiencing brand new, more complex emotions as a result.

titles.title: Deadpool & Wolverine
titles.overview: Deadpool is offered a place in the Marvel Cinematic Universe by the Time Variance Authority, but instead recruits a variant of Wolverine.

titles.title: Wicked
titles.overview: Elphaba, a misunderstood young woman because of her green skin, and Glinda, a popular girl, become friends at Shiz University.

titles.title: Godzilla Minus One
titles.overview: Post-war Japan is at its lowest point when a new crisis emerges in the form of a giant monster, baptized in the horrific power of the atomic bomb.

titles.title: Planet Earth III
titles.overview: David Attenborough returns with a new landmark series exploring the natural wonders of our planet.

titles.title: Clarkson's Farm
titles.overview: Follow Jeremy Clarkson as he attempts to run a farm in the countryside.

titles.title: The Gentlemen
titles.overview: A soldier inherits his father's cannabis empire and is forced to work with a host of dangerous characters.

titles.title: Baby Reindeer
titles.overview: The story follows the journey of a struggling comedian who offers kindness to a woman who ends up stalking him.

titles.title: Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga
titles.overview: The origin story of renegade warrior Furiosa before she teamed up with Mad Max.

titles.title: Challengers
titles.overview: Tashi, a former tennis prodigy turned coach, has transformed her husband into a champion — but tensions rise when his former best friend arrives.

titles.title: A Quiet Place: Day One
titles.overview: Experience the day the world went quiet in this prequel to the hit franchise.

titles.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
titles.overview: After a family tragedy, three generations of the Deetz family return home to Winter River.

titles.title: Twisters
titles.overview: Kate Carter, a former storm chaser haunted by a devastating encounter with a tornado, is lured back to the open plains by her friend.

titles.title: Kingdom of the Planet of the Apes
titles.overview: Many years after the reign of Caesar, a young ape goes on a journey that will lead him to question everything he's been taught about the past.

titles.title: Alien: Romulus
titles.overview: While scavenging the deep ends of a derelict space station, a group of young space colonizers come face to face with the most terrifying life form in the universe.

titles.title: Gladiator II
titles.overview: Lucius must enter the Colosseum after his home is conquered by the tyrannical Emperors who now lead Rome.

titles.title: Moana 2
titles.overview: After receiving an unexpected call from her wayfinding ancestors, Moana must journey to the far seas of Oceania.

titles.title: The Wild Robot
titles.overview: After a shipwreck, an intelligent robot called Roz is stranded on an uninhabited island.
